Dialog.name: MSG_Konran_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5072 0 0}That Shadow... It looks like there's something wrong with it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_Konran_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5070 0 0}Huh... It seems to be having trouble finding its footing. It almost looks drunk.[n]{f 1 1}
